description: The official MongoDB driver for Node.js
name: mongodb

scripts.build:bundle: npm run bundle:driver && npm run bundle:types && npm run build:runtime-barrel
scripts.build:dts: npm run build:ts && api-extractor run && node etc/clean_definition_files.cjs && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false eslint --no-ignore --fix mongodb.d.ts
scripts.check:atlas: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/manual/mocharc.js test/manual/atlas_connectivity.test.ts
scripts.check:aws: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/integration/auth/mongodb_aws.test.ts test/integration/auth/mongodb_aws.prose.test.ts
scripts.check:csfle: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/integration/client-side-encryption
scripts.check:drivers-atlas-testing: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/atlas/drivers_atlas_testing.test.ts
scripts.check:dts: npm run build:bundle && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --target es2023 --module commonjs --noEmit mongodb.d.ts && tsd
scripts.check:eslint: npm run build:dts && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false eslint -v && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false eslint --max-warnings=0 --ext '.js,.ts' src test
scripts.check:kerberos: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/manual/mocharc.js test/manual/kerberos.test.ts
scripts.check:lambda: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_lambda.js test/integration/node-specific/examples/handler.test.js
scripts.check:lambda:aws: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_lambda.js test/integration/node-specific/examples/aws_handler.test.js
scripts.check:ldap: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/manual/mocharc.js test/manual/ldap.test.ts
scripts.check:lint: npm run build:dts && npm run check:dts && npm run check:eslint && npm run check:tsd
scripts.check:oidc-auth: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/integration/auth/auth.spec.test.ts
scripts.check:oidc-test: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/integration/auth/mongodb_oidc.prose.test.ts
scripts.check:search-indexes: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/manual/search-index-management.prose.test.ts
scripts.check:snappy: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha test/unit/assorted/snappy.test.js
scripts.check:socks5: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/manual/mocharc.js test/manual/socks5.test.ts
scripts.check:test: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/mocha_mongodb.js test/integration
scripts.check:tls: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha --config test/manual/mocharc.js test/manual/tls_support.test.ts
scripts.check:unit: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha test/unit
scripts.check:x509: npm run build:bundle && nyc mocha test/manual/x509_auth.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run check:lint && npm run test:all
scripts.test:all: npm run check:unit && npm run check:test
